steps.title: Identify the sentence's subject
steps.content: Despite the multiple names appearing early, the subject is analysis (singular). The possessive construction "Legal scholars James Melton and Tom Ginsburg's" modifies analysis, which is the noun that determines verb agreement.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Identify the grammar issue: subject-verb agreement. Rule: a singular subject takes a singular verb; possessive phrases modifying a noun don't change the noun's number.
  • Choice A — have identified: plural present perfect; does not agree with the singular subject "analysis." ✗
  • Choice B — identifies: singular simple present; correctly agrees with the singular subject "analysis." ✓
  • Choice C — are identifying: plural present progressive; does not agree with the singular subject "analysis." ✗
  • Choice D — identify: plural simple present; does not agree with the singular subject "analysis." ✗
That confirms B is correct.
